# Diners Club Black Credit Card
Sourcing of this Credit Card has been stopped. Existing customers of this card will continue to enjoy the benefits.
![Diners Club Black Credit Card](https://s7ap1.scene7.com/is/image/hdfcbankPWS/diners-club-black-desktop?fmt=webp)

## Card Benefits & Features
### Lifestyle Benefits
  * Complimentary Annual memberships of Club Marriott, Times Prime, Amazon Prime, Swiggy One (3 months), MMT BLACK on 8 Lac spends in anniversary year.
  * Earn 2X Reward Points on Weekend Dining on participating restaurants
  * 6 Complimentary Golf games every quarter across the finest courses in the world  
  
For details and list of golf courses, [click here(opens in a new tab)](https://golfoperationstatus.thriwe.com/hdfc-8a90d89a0s8d/index.php?ishdfcDiners=diners). 


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/diners-club-black-credit-card "View More")
![Diners Club Black Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Lounge Benefits
  * Unlimited lounge access to 1,300+ lounges in India and abroad for primary and add-on card members.
  * For Domestic lounge list, [click here](https://lms.hoi.in/lounge-list/hdfc-diners)
  * For International lounge list, please check Diners Travel Tool App
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/diners-club-black-credit-card/pdfs/lounge-tnc.pdf) for TnC


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/diners-club-black-credit-card "View More")
![Diners Club Black Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Milestone Benefits
  * Spend INR 80,000 or more to avail 2 voucher worth INR 500 from Tata Cliq, Uber, Book My Show or Cult Fit.
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/diners-club-black-credit-card/pdfs/T%20and%20C%20Diners%20Club%20Black.pdf) for details


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/diners-club-black-credit-card "View More")
![Diners Club Black Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Rewards Benefits
  * Earn 5 Reward Points for every ₹150/- spent
  * ₹1,000 CashBack across 200+ brands on your Credit Card via [PayZapp(opens in a new tab)](https://v.hdfcbank.com/payzapp/index.html?id=com.hdfcbank.payzapp&mc_id=pz-microsite&utm_source=PZ-Microsite&utm_medium=CTA&utm_campaign=PZ-Microsite-CTA&utm_id=PZ-Microsite&shortlink=pzmicrosite&c=PZ-Microsite&pid=PZ-Microsite&af_xp=social&source_caller=ui)
  * Earn up to 10X Reward Points on hotels and flight bookings on [SmartBuy(opens in a new tab)](https://offers.smartbuy.hdfcbank.com/v1/diners)


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/diners-club-black-credit-card "View More")
![Diners Club Black Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Insurance & Comprehensive Protection Benefits
  * Air Accident Insurance
  * Emergency overseas hospitalisation cover
  * Travel Insurance cover on baggage delay
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/diners-club-black-credit-card/pdfs/insurance.pdf) for policy cover
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://connect.hdfc.bank.in/applications/webforms/apply/HDFC_NomineeDetails/Nominee.aspx) to update nominee details


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/diners-club-black-credit-card "View More")
![pd-benefits-feature-1](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Banking Benefits
  * Up to 50 days of interest-free Credit from the date of purchase*
  * Ability to convert large transactions to a SmartEMI after purchase
  * Contactless payments* to improve your purchase experience
  * Protection against fraudulent transactions made on your Credit Card*
  * Simple card management via HDFC Bank [MyCards(opens in a new tab)](https://mycards.hdfcbank.com/)
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/diners-club-black-credit-card/pdfs/Diners%20Black%20Insurance%20Policy.pdf) for the Policy Cover


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/diners-club-black-credit-card "View More")
![Diners Club Black Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Know more about the card
  1. ### Card Control via MyCards
  2. ### Fees and Charges
  3. ### Redemption Value
  4. ### Redemption Limit
  5. ### Revolving Credit
  6. ### SmartEMI
  7. ### Foreign Currency Markup
  8. ### Most Important Terms and Conditions 


###  Card Control via MyCards 
**MyCards** , a mobile-based service platform for all credit card needs, facilitates convenient activation and management of your Diners Club Black Credit Card on the go. It ensures a seamless experience without the need for passwords or downloads.
  * Credit Card Registration and Activation
  * Set up your Card PIN
  * Manage Card Controls like Online Spends, Contactless Transactions
  * View Transactions / Download e-Statements
  * Check Reward Points
  * Block/ Re-Issue Your Card
  * Apply for an Add-on Card


![Card Management and Control](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Fees and Charges 
  * Joining/Renewal Membership Fee: ₹10,000 plus Applicable Taxes


  * On annual spends of ₹5 lakh, get ₹10,000 renewal fee waived off on your Diners Club Black Credit Card


[Click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/diners-club-black-credit-card/fees-and-charges) to view to view details of Fees and Charges
![Redemption Value](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Redemption Value 
  * You can redeem your Reward Points on [SmartBuy(opens in a new tab)](https://offers.smartbuy.hdfcbank.com/diners) or [NetBanking](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/ways-to-bank/digital-banking/online-banking/netbanking).
  * Reward Points Redemption against each category can be redeemed at:

  
| 1 Reward point Equivalent to  |  
| --- |  
| SmartBuy (Flight and hotel bookings)  | ₹1  |  
| Airmiles conversion  | Up to 1.0 Airmile  |  
| Products and Voucher  | up to ₹0.50  |  
| Cashback  | up to ₹0.30  |  
![Redemption Value](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Redemption Limit 
  * Reward Points can be redeemed up to 70% of the booking value for Flights and Hotel booking. The remaining amount will have to be paid via Credit Card. 
  * [Click Here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/diners-club-black-credit-card/pdfs/T%20and%20C%20Diners%20Club%20Black.pdf) to know more about Terms & Conditions


![Key Image](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Revolving Credit 
  * Enjoy Revolving Credit on your Diners Club Black Credit Card at nominal interest rate. Refer to the Fees and Charges section, to know more.


![Fuel Surcharge Waiver](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  SmartEMI 
  * Option to convert your big spends into EMI after purchase available on Diners Club Black Credit Card. To know more [click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/smartemi)


![Smart EMI](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Foreign Currency Markup 
  * 2% on all your foreign currency spends.


(These charges will be billed on your subsequent statement within 60 days from date of visit. Currency conversion rate is applicable as on the date of settlement)
![Foreign Currency Markup](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Most Important Terms and Conditions 
  * *The [Most Important Terms and Conditions](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/diners-club-black-credit-card/pdfs/T%20and%20C%20Diners%20Club%20Black.pdf) for each of our banking offerings features all the specific terms and conditions that govern their use. You must go through it thoroughly to fully understand the terms and conditions applicable to any banking product you choose. 
  * To know more about Diners Black Insurance Policy [Click Here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/diners-club-black-credit-card/pdfs/Diners%20Black%20Insurance%20Policy.pdf)
  * To know more about Diners Club Golf T & C, [Click Here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/diners-club-black-credit-card/pdfs/Diners%20Club%20Golf%20T%20and%20C.pdf)


![Fees and Renewal](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)

##  Frequently Asked Questions 
### 
Is the Diners Club Black Credit Card free?
While the HDFC Bank Diners Club Black Credit Card comes with a lot of benefits, it is not free. Cardholders typically incur an annual fee/renewal membership of ₹10000 plus applicable taxes for the membership, which grants them access to exclusive features and rewards such as welcome bonuses, renewal fee waivers, milestone benefits, and additional reward points associated with the Diners Club Black Credit Card.
### 
What are the features and Benefits of the Diners Club Black Card
The Diners Club Black Credit Card offers exclusive benefits like 'Buy 1 Get 1 Free' on entertainment through BookMyShow, 5X reward points on popular dining platforms like Swiggy and Zomato, and quarterly vouchers for milestone benefits/spends. The card provides two complimentary airport lounge accesses every quarter and additional features like Smart EMI and contactless payments.
### 
How to apply for a Diners Club Black Card?
We are currently not accepting new applications for the HDFC Bank Diners Club Black Credit Card. However, you can explore a range of other Credit Cards that may suit your needs. Click [here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards) to view our available options and find the right card for you.
